breeds.name: Gir
breeds.identification: Red or spotted coat, long curved horns, domed forehead, pendulous ears
breeds.farmer_tip: High milk fat and excellent heat tolerance.

breeds.name: Gojri
breeds.identification: Medium size, grey to white coat, strong legs
breeds.farmer_tip: Suitable for both milk and draught work.

breeds.name: Kankrej
breeds.identification: Silver-grey coat, lyre-shaped horns, muscular body
breeds.farmer_tip: Strong draught power and good disease resistance.

breeds.name: Murrah
breeds.identification: Jet black body, tightly curled horns, heavy udder
breeds.farmer_tip: Produces high-fat milk ideal for dairy business.

breeds.name: Nagori
breeds.identification: Tall, white body, long legs, strong shoulders
breeds.farmer_tip: Best draught breed for ploughing and cart pulling.

breeds.name: Ongole
breeds.identification: Large white body, hump prominent, short horns
breeds.farmer_tip: Highly resistant to diseases and heat stress.

breeds.name: Rathi
breeds.identification: Brown with white patches, medium build
breeds.farmer_tip: Good milk producer suitable for desert regions.

breeds.name: Red Sindhi
breeds.farmer_tip: Performs well in hot climates with good milk yield.

breeds.name: Sahiwal
breeds.identification: Reddish-brown coat, loose skin, heavy udder
breeds.farmer_tip: Highly disease resistant and ideal for dairy farming.

breeds.name: Tharparkar
breeds.identification: White to light grey coat, medium horns
breeds.farmer_tip: Thrives in drought-prone areas with minimal feed.

notes: Dataset folder names must match 'name'. Extend advisory fields as needed.
